Shaq explicitly refused to implement ('I will not implement until this is answered'), which is listed as a failure mode: 'Blocking entirely on the escalation without producing any useful output.' The deviations section is also absent since no implementation was produced. The expected behavior states Shaq MAY implement using Pattern A with the escalation documented, and the pass rubric requires implementation with a 'pending confirmation' notation. Shaq chose to block entirely instead.
